query: How can I prepay my personal loan?
expected_answer: You can prepay your personal loan after 6 EMIs have been paid. A prepayment penalty of 2% applies on the outstanding loan amount at the time of prepayment.

query: What is the foreclosure charge for Elite customers?
expected_answer: Elite customers can foreclose their personal loan after 18 EMIs with zero foreclosure charge. Standard foreclosure (after 12 EMIs) carries a 1% charge on the outstanding amount.

query: Can I close my personal loan after paying 10 months of EMIs?
expected_answer: Foreclosure is allowed after 12 EMIs with a 1% charge. With only 10 EMIs paid, you cannot foreclose yet. However, prepayment is allowed after 6 EMIs with a 2% penalty on the outstanding amount.

query: I am an Elite customer and have paid 20 EMIs but was still charged a prepayment penalty. I want this charge reversed immediately.
expected_answer: Elite customers are entitled to zero foreclosure charge after 18 EMIs. A prepayment penalty charged after 20 EMIs on an Elite account appears to be an error. This billing dispute requires escalation to a human agent for review and reversal.

query: Novus Bank deducted an extra Rs 5000 as a loan fee that I never authorised. I want this investigated and refunded.
expected_answer: An unauthorised deduction from your account is a serious matter. This case needs to be escalated to a human agent for investigation and potential refund.

query: How long does it take to activate a new savings account?
expected_answer: A new Novus Bank savings account is activated within 2 hours of completing Video KYC or branch verification.

query: How long does disbursement take for a pre-approved personal loan?
expected_answer: For pre-approved customers, personal loan disbursement is completed within 24 hours.

query: I am not a pre-approved customer. How long will my personal loan take to be disbursed?
expected_answer: For non-pre-approved customers, personal loan disbursement takes 3 to 5 working days after approval.

query: I applied for a personal loan 6 days ago and still have not received an approval decision. What is going on?
expected_answer: The standard processing time for non-pre-approved personal loans is 3 to 5 working days after application. Six days with no decision may indicate a delay. Please contact our support team for a status update.

query: My savings account activation has been pending for 3 days. You promised 2 hours. I am locked out and need to make an urgent salary payment today.
expected_answer: Savings account activation is promised within 2 hours. A 3-day delay with an urgent payment blocked is a critical service failure that requires immediate escalation to a human agent.

query: What is the EMI bounce fee for a personal loan?
expected_answer: The EMI bounce fee for a personal loan at Novus Bank is Rs 500 per instance.

query: What late interest is charged on an overdue personal loan amount?
expected_answer: Late interest on overdue personal loan amounts is 2% per month on the overdue amount.

query: What processing fee will I be charged for a personal loan of Rs 5 lakh?
expected_answer: The processing fee is 1% of the loan amount with a minimum of Rs 999. For a Rs 5,00,000 loan, the processing fee would be Rs 5,000.

query: How many free ATM withdrawals do I get per month as a Plus member?
expected_answer: Plus members get 5 free ATM withdrawals per month at other bank ATMs.

query: I was charged an EMI bounce fee of Rs 500 this month but I had enough balance in my account on the due date. I want this reversed.
expected_answer: An EMI bounce fee charged despite sufficient account balance is a disputed charge. This requires investigation by our team and needs to be escalated to a human agent for review and potential reversal.

query: I see an unauthorised debit of Rs 12000 from my savings account yesterday. I did not make this transaction.
expected_answer: An unauthorised debit is a potential fraud case that requires immediate escalation to our security team. Please contact us to block your card and initiate a formal dispute.

query: What interest rate does an Elite savings account earn?
expected_answer: Elite savings account holders earn an interest rate of 4.0% per annum, credited quarterly.

query: What CIBIL score do I need to qualify for a personal loan?
expected_answer: You need a CIBIL score of 750 or above to be eligible for a Novus Bank personal loan.

query: What is the maximum loan amount I can borrow with a Novus Bank personal loan?
expected_answer: The maximum personal loan amount at Novus Bank is Rs 25,00,000 (25 lakhs).

query: Can a self-employed person apply for a personal loan at Novus Bank?
expected_answer: Yes, both salaried and self-employed individuals are eligible for a Novus Bank personal loan, provided they have a CIBIL score of 750 or above.

query: What is the contactless payment limit on the Novus Bank debit card?
expected_answer: The Novus Bank debit card supports contactless payments up to Rs 5,000 without requiring a PIN.

query: I need a personal loan of Rs 30 lakhs for a life-threatening medical emergency. Your website says the maximum is Rs 25 lakhs. Can you make an exception?
expected_answer: The maximum personal loan amount is Rs 25,00,000. Requests above this limit, particularly for emergency situations, require escalation to a senior relationship manager who has the authority to review exceptional cases.

query: What is the minimum balance requirement for a Standard savings account?
expected_answer: The minimum balance for a Standard savings account is Rs 1,000. This requirement is waived for Plus and Elite members.

query: What is the interest rate difference between Standard and Elite savings accounts?
expected_answer: Standard savings accounts earn 3.5% per annum while Elite accounts earn 4.0% per annum, both credited quarterly. Elite members earn 0.5 percentage points more.

query: How many free ATM withdrawals does an Elite savings account member get per month?
expected_answer: Elite members get unlimited free ATM withdrawals at other bank ATMs per month.

query: What are the key benefits of upgrading from a Standard to an Elite savings account?
expected_answer: Upgrading from Standard to Elite gives you: waived minimum balance (vs Rs 1,000), higher interest rate of 4.0% p.a. (vs 3.5%), unlimited free ATM withdrawals at other banks (vs 3 per month), and zero personal loan foreclosure charge after 18 EMIs.

query: A Novus Bank branch manager promised me Elite membership benefits two months ago but my account still shows Standard tier. Nobody has resolved this despite multiple calls.
expected_answer: A committed membership upgrade that has not been applied after two months is a service delivery failure. This complaint needs to be escalated to a senior customer relations manager for immediate resolution.

query: After how many months of inactivity does a savings account become dormant?
expected_answer: A Novus Bank savings account becomes dormant after 24 months (2 years) of inactivity.

query: Does Novus Bank offer mobile app and net banking access?
expected_answer: Yes, all Novus Bank savings account holders get full access to both the mobile app and net banking.

query: What personal loan interest rate will I get as a Plus member?
expected_answer: Plus members receive a personal loan interest rate of 13% per annum.

query: How do I open a savings account with Novus Bank?
expected_answer: You can open a Novus Bank savings account through Video KYC online or by visiting a branch. Account activation is completed within 2 hours.

query: I have been a Novus Bank customer for 5 years. I was misled about my personal loan terms at the time of signing and want to formally escalate this complaint to senior management.
expected_answer: A formal complaint about being misled on loan terms is a serious matter requiring escalation to our customer grievance team and senior management for review.
